## Format name

The name of the AI tool format (e.g., "LangChain BaseTool", "CrewAI Tool").

## Format specification

Link to the official documentation or specification for this format.

## Example tool definition

```json
// A concrete example of a tool defined in this format
```

## Mapping to IR

How would this format's fields map to the aitx Universal Tool IR?

| Format field | IR field | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| | | |

## Would you like to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting someone else implement it
